name: archmind
description: ArchMind full-stack RAG assistant builder platform.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @archmind/shared && npm run build -w @archmind/api && npm run build -w @archmind/web && npm run build -w @archmind/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @archmind/shared && npm run typecheck -w @archmind/api && npm run typecheck -w @archmind/web && npm run typecheck -w @archmind/desktop
